items.name_cn:
Milk Tea·
LE 37_Mini Bucket Bag
The bucket bag that took the fashion world by storm upon its debut!
Smooth calfskin body with a simple, structured silhouette; it looks structured without being too sharp.
Paired with the brand's signature logo new insert buckle, it exudes a unique charm that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Model: 765870
Size: 15x13x6cm

items.name_cn:
◽Kate 99 ◽
When it comes to the hottest bags of these past two years, the shoulder bag must be mentioned! Carried with a thin strap, the bag sits perfectly under the arm, freeing your hands and making your arms look longer and more free. Carrying this small bag creates a seamless look with your outfit, giving off a carefree French elegance that makes you look effortlessly stylish. It also comes with a long leather strap for different carrying styles! One bag, multiple uses! Model S08043, Size: 26x13.5x4.5cm

items.name_cn:
New Spring 25 LouLou Suede
Soft to the touch, comes with a detachable card holder and full-label mirror. Features a sliding chain, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear to meet various outfit needs!
Suede material makes the bag look especially exquisite. Size: 25x12x6cm. Style: 1Y821749

items.name_en: Beige crocodile print with gold buckle
items.name_cn:
Beige crocodile print with gold buckle
sunset 22cm_
An invincible classic! The Sunset bag remains incredibly popular despite being out for so long, showing just how much people love it. High-quality Italian imported cowhide, ZP mold hardware, pursuing every single detail to be as close to the authentic as possible. High quality at a reasonable price. Don't hesitate, act now!
Size: 22x8x16
Model: 422906
